name: reverse_string
cpp_unit: std::string reverse_string(std::string s){ std::string result = ""; int n = (int)s.size(); for(int i=0;i<n;i++) result += s[n-1-i]; return result; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%s\n", reverse_string("Hello, World").c_str()); printf("%s\n", reverse_string("abc").c_str()); return 0; }

name: count_vowels
cpp_unit: int count_vowels(std::string s){ int count = 0; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ int c = (unsigned char)s[i]; if(c>=65 && c<=90) c += 32; if(c==97||c==101||c==105||c==111||c==117) count++; } return count; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%d\n", count_vowels("Hello, World")); printf("%d\n", count_vowels("Programming")); return 0; }

name: caesar_shift
cpp_unit: std::string caesar_shift(std::string s, int shift){ std::string result = ""; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ int c = (unsigned char)s[i]; if(c>=65 && c<=90) c = (c-65+shift)%26+65; else if(c>=97 && c<=122) c = (c-97+shift)%26+97; result += (char)c; } return result; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%s\n", caesar_shift("Hello, World", 3).c_str()); printf("%s\n", caesar_shift("abcXYZ", 3).c_str()); return 0; }
